data.title: Decades of planning led to Trump cutting NPR and PBS funding.
data.description: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped significantly to 4.3% in January compared to 5.2% in December, indicating an improvement in the job market. The number of jobless individuals decreased by 500,000 to a total of 7.2 million people. Additionally, the economy added 500,000 jobs during the same period. This positive trend suggests a growing economy and increased opportunities for individuals seeking employment.

data.title: U.S. farmers may suffer from Trump's 100% tariff on Russian goods, possibly increasing fertilizers' cost.
data.description: The proposal put forth by President Trump to implement a 100% tariff on products from Russia has the potential to significantly impact the cost of urea, a vital fertilizer for crops like corn and other row crops.

data.title: GOGL to hold Special General Meeting on August 19, 2025. More details on their website.
data.description: Golden Ocean Group Limited, listed on NASDAQ as GOGL and on Euronext Oslo Børs as GOGL, has scheduled a Special General Meeting for August 19, 2025. The Notice of the Special General Meeting and further details are available on their website www.goldenocean.bm. Stay updated on this significant event for the company.

data.title: Mineros S.A. starts US$12 million share repurchase program approved at General Shareholders' Meeting on March 31, 2025.
data.description: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA, MINEROS: CB), a prominent gold producer in Latin America, has announced the approval of a share repurchase program by its Board of Directors. The program, approved on March 31, 2025, during the General Shareholders' Meeting, authorizes the company to repurchase its common shares up to the value of US$12 million. The repurchases will be conducted through the Colombian Stock Exchange (Bolsa de Val).

data.title: Global Cybersecurity Insurance Market to reach $32.19 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 14.2% from 2025 at $16.54 billion.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 18, 2025, it has been projected by MarketsandMarkets™ that the worldwide Cybersecurity Insurance Market is anticipated to increase from $16.54 billion in 2025 to $32.19 billion by 2030. This growth signifies a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.2% over the forecast period.

data.title: Sable finalizes C$1.75M private investment with Moxico Resources.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 15%, with over 20 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the gross domestic product (GDP) has declined by 5% in the past year, marking the steepest decrease in decades. These economic indicators paint a grim picture of the current state of the economy, as the country struggles to cope with the widespread impact of the global pandemic. Experts are now calling for urgent government intervention and stimulus measures to address the growing unemployment crisis and revive the economy.

data.title: Is the US market riskier than emerging markets? Trump tariffs, volatile dollar, and erratic bond market impact global investments.
data.description: Despite the recent recovery of the U.S. stock market, concerns have arisen due to the impact of the Trump tariffs, fluctuations in the dollar, and instability in the bond market. This has prompted global investors to reconsider their investment strategies.
Japan MOF Official States G20's Support for Central Bank Independence Is "Meaningful" .

data.title: PEN America has acquired OnlineSOS to enhance digital safety and free expression efforts.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, PEN America, a prominent advocate for global free expression, announced the acquisition of OnlineSOS, a leading U.S. nonprofit dedicated to combating online abuse. This strategic move emphasizes the collective efforts of both organizations towards addressing digital safety concerns. The acquisition involves taking over the website and digital safety resources of OnlineSOS, solidifying PEN America's commitment to this critical issue.

data.title: RaySearch and Radiology Oncology Systems partner to improve cancer care access globally, targeting tech advancements; announced on July 18, 2025.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) and Radiology Oncology Systems, Inc. (ROS) disclosed a significant partnership. The collaboration is geared towards exploring and capitalizing on various technological prospects, encompassing new innovations and current offerings. This alliance aims to leverage the strengths of both companies, with a strong emphasis on synergy and innovation in the field of [specific industry].
